# Roadmap Communication Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Roadmap Communication — <Topic / Period>

## Audience

## Message objective

## Roadmap summary

## What is changing

## What is not changing

## Why this sequence / trade-off

## Stakeholder impact

## Draft message

## Short version

## Questions / approvals needed
```
